rigs.title: Active Rig Fleet Registry
rigs.subtitle: Monitor locations, active drill depths, crew counts, and mobilization statuses

timesheets.title: Rig Operations Daily Logs (Timesheets)
timesheets.subtitle: Review and log daily drilling hours, standby schedules, repairs, and down times
timesheets.click_to_edit: Click any row in the spreadsheet grid below to edit daily operations log
timesheets.no_timesheet_desc: Select a rig's timesheet from the dropdown menu to inspect operating sheets, utilization ratios, and modify daily hours logs.
timesheets.error_hours_desc: Daily log hours sum cannot exceed 24 hours (Current: {{hours}} hours).
timesheets.success_desc: Timesheet logs for Day {{day}} of {{rig}} updated successfully.
timesheets.audit_update: Updated shift logs for Day {{day}} on Rig: {{rig}}. Total logged hours: {{total}} hrs.

auth.title: Security Portal Access
auth.subtitle: Authenticate using your domain account credentials
auth.pitch_desc: Manage purchase requisitions, request for quotations, compare bids, approve purchase orders, track offshore/land rig timesheets, and monitor live warehouse inventory status in a unified secure workspace.
auth.rbac_desc: Custom permissions mapped directly to corporate operational structures.
auth.jwt_desc: Stateless architecture with signature validation and storage logic.
auth.remember_me: Remember my session on this computer
auth.recover_subtitle: Enter your email to receive recovery instructions
auth.success_reset_sent: Password reset link sent! Check your email instructions to proceed.

settings.title: System & Account Settings

settings.toast_desc: Your profile information and platform preferences were successfully saved.

activity_logs.title: Recent Operations Log
activity_logs.subtitle: Review chronological operations updates, system updates, and user session actions
activity_logs.persistence_desc: This log utilizes standard Angular Signals state, persisted inside local storage. Creating PRs, approving POs, or shifting timesheets will write real-time audit triggers to this board, reflecting the active logged-in user.
activity_logs.schema_desc: On production, this data-collection interface interfaces directly with audit trail backend brokers (e.g. CDC triggers or NestJS audit intercepts).
activity_logs.no_activity: No activity logged in this workspace yet.

audit_trail.no_logs: No logs matching active filtration parameters.
audit_trail.select_log_prompt: Select any transaction row to inspect structural details.

invoices.default_approve_comments: Calculated taxes & retention verified against contract rate card.

purchase_orders.title: Purchase Orders Registry

purchase_orders.search_placeholder: Search by PO number, vendor, or description...
purchase_orders.no_records: No purchase orders match the current filters.
purchase_orders.notif_approved_desc: {{po}} has been approved and is ready for vendor issuance.
purchase_orders.notif_delivered_desc: {{po}} delivery confirmed. Proceed to invoice matching.
purchase_orders.sig_submitted_desc: You have signed off on {{po}} as {{role}}.
purchase_orders.po_finalized_desc: All approval gates cleared. Order {{po}} is ready for dispatch.
purchase_orders.audit_sign: Authorized signature step: {{role}} sign-off. Approver: {{approver}}. Comments: {{comments}}
purchase_orders.audit_dispatch: Purchase order {{po}} fully approved by all delegation thresholds. Sent to vendor.
purchase_orders.wht_note_desc: Pursuant to Section 52 of corporate tax laws, a withholding deduction of {{pct}}% has been retained at source. Net payable value reflects deduction applied to base contract sum.
purchase_orders.audit_log_subtitle: Authorization signatures required to dispatch procurement contract
purchase_orders.authorize_po_desc: Submit your signature to release this order.
purchase_orders.empty_desc: Select any Purchase Order from the master registry panel on the left to inspect totals, tax detail structures, and authorization status.

purchase_requests.notif_approved_desc: {{pr}} has been approved and is ready for RFQ generation.
purchase_requests.notif_created_desc: {{pr}} has been submitted for department review.
purchase_requests.err_validation_items: Please select valid materials and quantities for all lines.
purchase_requests.err_validation_desc: Please write a purpose/description for this request.
purchase_requests.audit_created: Created purchase request for department {{dept}}. Target Delivery Date: {{date}}. Description: {{desc}}.
purchase_requests.audit_approved: Requisition {{pr}} approved. Ready for RFQ matching.
purchase_requests.notif_approved_desc_detailed: Purchase Request {{pr}} status has been updated to Approved. You can now generate an RFQ.
purchase_requests.form_subtitle: Please provide cost allocation details and specify material requirements below.

rfqs.err_invalid_price_desc: Bid price must be greater than zero.

quotation_comparison.title: Quotation Analysis & Comparison Matrix
quotation_comparison.subtitle: Compare vendor bids side-by-side and generate a purchase order for the winning supplier

quotation_comparison.select_rfq: Select Request for Quotation (RFQ) to Analyze
quotation_comparison.comparison_subheader: Evaluated bids sorted by total delivery cost. Recommended vendor highlighted.

quotation_comparison.no_rfq_desc: Select an active RFQ from the dropdown menu above or click 'Compare Bids' from the RFQ table listing to display side-by-side bid metrics.
quotation_comparison.notif_awarded_desc: Purchase Order {{po}} has been successfully generated for {{vendor}}.
quotation_comparison.err_failed_desc: Could not create Purchase Order from this quotation. Please try again.
